name: Principal Inspection
description: Detailed close-up inspection by accredited Level 3/4 inspector — TfNSW-BIM §4.2 max 5-year cycle

name: Routine Visual
description: Drive-by / walk-over inspection by Level 1/2 inspector — TfNSW-BIM §4.3 annual or bi-annual

name: Special Scour
description: Post-flood or scheduled scour assessment per Austroads AP-G71.8 §5.2

name: Underwater / Dive
description: Submerged element inspection by qualified diver — required for scour-critical bridges

name: Load Rating Review
description: Structural assessment by NER/CPEng engineer per AS 5100.7:2017

name: Post-Event Inspection
description: Emergency inspection after flood event / vehicle impact / seismic activity

name: NDT Inspection
description: Non-destructive testing — magnetic particle / ultrasonic for fatigue-sensitive steel per AS 5100.6
